# Codev_Tim

> Codev_Tim is the engineering operating system of Timur,
> a software engineer and ERP developer based in Tashkent.
> This site documents production systems, architecture, and engineering notes.

## Primary Content
- Operations Center: /en
- Product Registry: /en/projects
- Engineer Profile: /en/about
- Knowledge Base: /en/writing

## Author
- Name: Timur
- Role: Software Engineer, System Architect, ERP Developer
- Location: Tashkent, UTC+5

## Topics
- ERP Systems
- Business Automation
- System Architecture
- ASP.NET Core
- PostgreSQL
- React
- Next.js

## Terminology
- Engineering Record: internal product documentation for a registered system
- Engineering Note: analytical article in the Knowledge Base
- Product Registry: catalog of registered production systems
- Engineering Protocols: numbered engineering standards
- Operations Center: system dashboard and status board

## Optional
- Full sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Communication Module: /en/contact
- Languages: en, ru, uz
